duplicates.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Urgent Home Pest Control Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Xly

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly surge in google trends searches for diy home repair signals consumer stress lifting xly

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Urgent Home Pest Control Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Xly
idea.thesis: A sudden spike in urgent pest control searches indicates rising consumer stress and home maintenance urgency, often preceding discretionary spending rebounds. Increased home-related service searches correlate with discretionary consumer sector demand growth.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLY when 3-week moving average of 'urgent home pest control' search volume rises 25% above its 12-week average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLY when 3-week moving average of 'urgent home pest control' search volume rises 25% above its 12-week average Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if the search volume drops below its 12-week average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer stress-driven home service searches fluctuate often, creating multiple monthly signals.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'urgent home pest control' signals consumer stress lifting XLY
schema.behavior: A sudden spike in urgent pest control searches indicates rising consumer stress and home maintenance urgency, often preceding discretionary spending rebounds.

market_impact.rationale: Increased home-related service searches correlate with discretionary consumer sector demand growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when 3-week moving average of 'urgent home pest control' search volume rises 25% above its 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if the search volume drops below its 12-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer stress-driven home service searches fluctuate often, creating multiple monthly signals.

duplicates.title: Weekly Jump In Google Trends Searches For Bulk Commodity Shipment Delay Triggers Bearish Materials Sector

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly increase in google trends searches for bulk shipping delay signals bearish xlb

idea.title: Weekly Jump In Google Trends Searches For Bulk Commodity Shipment Delay Triggers Bearish Materials Sector
idea.thesis: Rising concern about shipment delays signals supply chain stress impacting raw materials availability. Delayed commodity shipments disrupt production and increase costs for materials companies.
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLB when weekly search volume for 'bulk commodity shipment delay' rises 35% above 10-week average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLB when weekly search volume for 'bulk commodity shipment delay' rises 35% above 10-week average Exit: Exit after 5 weeks or when volume falls below 10-week average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity logistics issues regularly generate weekly search volume bursts.

schema.idea: Weekly jump in Google Trends searches for 'bulk commodity shipment delay' triggers bearish materials sector
schema.behavior: Rising concern about shipment delays signals supply chain stress impacting raw materials availability.

market_impact.rationale: Delayed commodity shipments disrupt production and increase costs for materials companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLB when weekly search volume for 'bulk commodity shipment delay' rises 35% above 10-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or when volume falls below 10-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity logistics issues regularly generate weekly search volume bursts.
